problem.title: Counting Bits
problem.description: Given an integer n, return an array ans of length n + 1 such that for each i (0 <= i <= n), ans[i] is the number of 1's in the binary representation of i.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Use the identity: the number of set bits in i equals the number of set bits in i>>1 (i with its last bit dropped) plus the value of i's least significant bit. This lets each dp[i] be computed in O(1) from a previously computed entry, achieving an O(n) total with no bit-counting per number.
